concepts: trend pullback continuation after deeper value reclaim into structural support
volatility squeeze expansion confirmed by persistence instead of first breakout bar
failed breakdown reclaim that must hold before continuation entry

next_cycle_focus: Run the SOL/ETH/TAO 4h basket and only refine branches that show real blind-window participation and post-cost edge. Abort branches that remain structurally sparse instead of hiding them behind extra confirmation layers.
rationale: Cycle 370 and research_program.json align on a SOL 4h primary lane with SOL 1h, ETH 4h, and TAO 4h in the validation basket under a balanced chop/transition brief. I aligned the batch directly to the live hypotheses: SOL 4h deep-value reclaim for conservative pullback continuation, ETH 4h squeeze-persistence for expansion confirmed by hold rather than the first breakout bar, and TAO 4h failed-breakdown-hold for reclaim continuation after downside rejection.
